metadata.title: World-model papers
metadata.description: Browse core world-model papers across research and industry.

title: World-model papers
description: A curated paper index spanning foundational world models, video prediction, embodied intelligence, robotics, and autonomous driving.
guide_title: How to use this paper index
guide_description: Start with the topic filter if you already know your angle. If not, scan the summaries first, then open the papers that define planning, video prediction, embodied agents, and physical-AI transfer. This page is meant to shorten the path from curiosity to a credible reading list.

items.question: What counts as a world-model paper here?
items.answer: The index focuses on papers that model dynamics, latent environments, action-conditioned prediction, planning with internal simulation, or adjacent predictive systems that materially shaped the world-model category.

items.question: How should I start if I am new to world models?
items.answer: Start with foundational papers, then branch by use case: video and game environments, robotics and embodied intelligence, or autonomous driving. The editorial summaries are there to help you decide what to read next.

items.question: Does this page track only academic papers?
items.answer: No. It prioritizes academic papers, but it also reflects papers and technical write-ups that matter for how labs and companies operationalize world-model systems.
